response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical breadth, open-source contributions, and leadership in project development, but lacks demonstrated experience in IT architecture design, UML modeling, and formal project management — critical for this role — and his German proficiency is only basic, falling short of the required C1 level.
strengths: Extensive open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple DLang libraries
Proven full-stack expertise across diverse technologies and environments
Strong track record of mentoring, workshops, and technical knowledge sharing
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No explicit evidence of UML, IT architecture design, or formal project management experience
Lack of demonstrated experience in compliance, risk management, or client advisory in IT consulting context
